prerequisites.value: Balor Whip, Improved Balor Whip, Weapon Focus ( whip ), Whip Mastery, base attack bonus +16.

description.value: **Benefit:** When you use Improved Balor Whip to make a single attack at your highest attack bonus, your critical threat range increases to 19â20 and you gain a +4 bonus on critical confirmation rolls if you threaten a critical hit with that attack.
